title: Putin, Xi signal unity but fail to reach deal on pipeline sought by Russia
summary_full: The Power of Siberia 2 pipeline could carry 50 billion cubic meters of Russian natural gas annually to China.
summary_public: The Power of Siberia 2 pipeline could carry 50 billion cubic meters of Russian natural gas annually to China.

RU.label: negative
